devnotes.summary: Enumeration for data initialization methods in the TDevelopment class. This enumeration defines how the development data is initialized, either from measured dates or calculated values. - EC_Date: Uses measured dates for specific growth stages (e.g., EC25, EC30, EC37). - Days_to_EC: Uses a calculated approach based on days to reach specific growth stages.
Enumeration for options related to Phyllochron/TSumInternode calculation.

This unit defines the TDevelopment class, a core component of the HUME-Wheat crop model, responsible for simulating the phenological development (growth stages) of wheat. The class models the progression of the crop through its life cycle, from sowing and emergence to maturity and harvest, using temperature, daylength, and genetic parameters.
Key features:
Growth Stage Tracking: Uses both integer (EC, BBCH, Zadoks) and continuous (xstage) scales to represent crop development.
Development Rates: Calculates stage-specific development rates, including the effects of temperature (thermal time), photoperiod (daylength), and vernalization (cold exposure).
Leaf Appearance and Initiation: Simulates the initiation and appearance of leaves on the main stem, using phyllochron and plastochron intervals.
Event Timing: Records the day of year (DOY) for key phenological events (e.g., stem elongation, heading, flowering, ripeness).
Parameterization: Supports genetic and environmental parameters (e.g., base temperature, photoperiod sensitivity, vernalization requirements).
Data Integration: Can initialize and calibrate development using measured data (e.g., measured EC dates).
Modular Design: Integrates with other model components via external variables and options, allowing for flexible coupling with growth, water, and nitrogen modules.
Phenological stages in integer values and corresponding BBCH stages:
1 Emergence to terminal spikelet(TS), BBCH 10-30
2 TS to end of vegetative growth, BBCH 30-39
3 End of vegetative growth and beginning ear growth to end of pre-anthesis ear growth, BBCH 40-57
4 End of pre-anthesis ear growth to beginning of grain filling (anthesis occurs during this phase), BBCH 57-71
5 Beginning of grain filling to physiological maturity, BBCH 71-90
6 Physiological maturity to fallow (harvest), BBCH 90-99
7 Fallow to sowing
8 Sowing to germination
9 Germination to emergence
Typical usage: This module is used to drive the timing of crop processes (e.g., leaf growth, flowering, grain filling) in response to weather and management, providing the developmental framework for the rest of the crop model.
procedure to create variables for the TDevelopment class.
procedure to create states for the TDevelopment class.
procedure to create parameters for the TDevelopment class.
procedure to create extern variables for the TDevelopment class.
procedure to create options for the TDevelopment class.
procedure to initialize comments for the TDevelopment class.
procedure to look for EC30 measurement date in the data series.
procedure set all variable values to zero.
procedure to calculate development rates for different stages.
procedure to calculate development rates for different stages.
procedure to calculate development rates for different stages.
procedure to calculate development rate at GS9.
procedure to calculate development rates for different stages.
Development rate during istage 1.
Development rate during istage 2.
Development rate during istage 3.
Development rate during istage 4.
Development rate during istage 5.
Development rate during istage 6.
Development rate during istage 9.
Xstage multiplied by ten for easier plotting.
Integer value of the development stage.
Relative development rate influenced by photoperiod.
Relative development rate influenced by vernalization.
Effective day temperature above the base temperature.
Zadock's stages.
Vernalisation factor.
Variable photoperiodic influence factor (0..1).
Vernalisation variable.
Temperature sum from emergence to EC30.
Day when EC equals 10.
Day when EC equals 29.
Day when EC equals 50.
Day when EC equals 59.
Day when EC equals 75.
Day when EC equals 90.
Day of year for beginning of stem elongation.
Day of year when BBCH 51 occurs.
Day of year when BBCH 59 occurs.
Day of year for beginning of flowering.
Day of year when BBCH 88 occurs.
Day of year for physiological ripeness.
Day of year of the sowing date.
Number of leaves not formed at Xstage 2.
Days since sowing.
Cumulative vernalisation.
EC stage.
Thermal developmental units.
Temperature sum since sowing.
Non-integer growth stage indicator ranging from zero to six.
Number of leaves on the main stem.
Temperature sum since EC30.
Temperature sum until EC30.
Temperature sum until EC37.
Initial leaf number on the main stem.
Photoperiodic daylength.
Mean air temperature.
Temperature sum from stage 37 to 39.
Genotype-specific parameter of photoperiod sensitivity.
Genotype-specific parameter of vernalisation sensitivity.
Sowing depth in centimeters (not currently in use).
Phyllochron interval in thermal time (degree days) between successive leaf and tiller appearances.
Thermal time from end of leaf growth through pre-anthesis ear growth.
Thermal time between pre-anthesis ear growth and beginning of grain filling (anthesis occurs during this phase) in °Cd.
Thermal time between beginning of grain fill and maturity in °Cd.
Thermal time from germination to seedling emergence in °Cd.
Base temperature.
Multiplier of the phyllochron interval during stem elongation.
Interval in thermal time between leaf initiation.
Initial number of initiated leaves at emergence.
Xstage value at which no further leaf primordia are initiated.
Temperature sum between two internodes.
Maximum number of vernalisation days that increase developmental rate.
Maximum daylength that increases developmental rate.
Minimum vernalisation temperature.
Temperature at which vernalisation starts to be optimal.
Temperature at which vernalisation stops being optimal.
Temperature at which vernalisation effect becomes zero.
Weighting factor for daylength influence.
Option for selecting the data initialization method.
Option for recalculating the sowing date.
Option for TSumInternode calculation.
Option for using measured dates for development.
Initializes the TDevelopment model with global parameters and sets initial values for variables and states.
Calculates the rates conditions.
Calculates the daylength influence factor.
Photoperiodic influence factor (0..1).
Development rate during istage 1.
Development rate during istage 2.
Development rate during istage 3.
Development rate during istage 4.
Development rate during istage 5.
Development rate during istage 6.
Development rate during istage 9.
Xstage multiplied by ten for convenience of plotting.
Integer value of the development stage.
Vernalisation factor.
Relative development rate effect of photoperiod.
Relative development rate effect of vernalisation.
Temperature sum from emergence to EC30.
Thermal time from germination to seedling emergence (°Cd).
Thermal time between pre-anthesis ear growth and start of grain filling (°Cd).
Thermal time between start of grain filling and maturity (°Cd).
Minimum vernalisation temperature.
Temperature where vernalisation starts to be optimal.
Temperature where vernalisation ends being optimal.
Temperature where vernalisation effect becomes zero.
